title: AI Review Triage Decision
description: Routing contract for ai-review orchestration. Triage model outputs this JSON to drive review depth, model selection, and subagent dispatch.

risk_level.description: Overall risk assessment of the diff. none = no meaningful change detected.

review_mode.description: Review depth to apply. skip = no review needed, fast = lightweight check, deep = thorough analysis.

has_must_fix.description: Whether the triage believes there is at least one must-fix issue before merge.

subagents.description: Recommended specialized reviewer subagents for later orchestration. Empty array means none required.

categories.description: Change categories detected in the diff.

reason.description: Short explanation of why this risk level and review mode were chosen.

confidence.description: How reliable the triage model considers its own routing decision.
